name: Poll Story Template
description: Interactive poll story using Instagram's poll sticker. Quick-fire engagement tool for matchday content, opinion gathering, and fun debates.
guidelines: Clean design with the poll question prominently displayed above the Instagram poll sticker zone. Use a relevant background image (action shot, stadium, player matchup). Keep options short — the native poll sticker has character limits. Great for pre-match engagement, half-time polls, and daily content. Results can be shared in a follow-up story.
